description: Stream AI chat responses token-by-token via SSE so investors see words appear progressively instead of waiting for the full response (Issue #23)

userStories.title: Add formatResultsStream() to LLM service
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a streaming variant of formatResults() that emits tokens via a callback as Claude generates them.
acceptanceCriteria: formatResultsStream(userQuestion, sqlQuery, results, conversationHistory, onChunk) exported from llmService.js
Uses client.messages.stream() from the Anthropic SDK to stream tokens
Calls onChunk(text) for each text_delta received
Returns the final Anthropic message object
Falls back to calling onChunk once with full text if no API key configured
npm test passes in the backend

userStories.title: Add streaming message endpoint to backend
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a POST endpoint that runs the full pipeline and streams the formatting step via SSE.
acceptanceCriteria: New route POST /api/chat/sessions/:sessionId/message/stream added to chat.js
streamMessage() controller function added to chatController.js
Sets SSE headers (Content-Type: text/event-stream, Cache-Control: no-cache, Connection: keep-alive) before any processing
Sends error token event and closes on SQL generation/validation/execution failures
Calls formatResultsStream(), writing each chunk as SSE token event
After streaming: stores user + assistant messages in DB, runs routing analysis
Sends done event with messageId and metadata, then [DONE] sentinel
npm test passes in the backend

userStories.title: Add sendMessageStream() to frontend API service
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a client-side method to read the SSE stream and call callbacks for each token.
acceptanceCriteria: chatAPI.sendMessageStream(sessionId, message, onChunk, onDone) added to api.js
Uses fetch with response.body.getReader() to read SSE stream
Calls onChunk(content) for type:token events
Calls onDone(data) for type:done events
Throws on type:error events
Redirects to /login on 401
Existing chatAPI.sendMessage() unchanged
Build passes

userStories.title: Update useChatSession to use streaming
userStories.description: As an investor, I want to see the AI response appear word by word so the chat feels fast and alive.
acceptanceCriteria: sendMessage() in useChatSession.js uses chatAPI.sendMessageStream() instead of chatAPI.sendMessage()
A streaming placeholder assistant message (isStreaming: true, content: '') added to messages after user message
Placeholder content updated progressively as onChunk fires
On completion placeholder replaced with final message including metadata
On error both optimistic user message and streaming placeholder removed
Build passes

userStories.title: Show streaming indicator in ChatMessage
userStories.description: As an investor, I want a visual cue that the AI is actively generating a response.
acceptanceCriteria: ChatMessage renders a blinking cursor (animate-pulse) after content when message.isStreaming is true
A 'Thinking...' badge shown while message.isStreaming and content is empty
No visual change to non-streaming messages
Build passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
